axis_responsibility.Agent: Agent returned facts are only observed; the message does not add Agent status or verdict fields.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Work/task.md supplies the human title and Building Plan supplies work composition; notification text does not redefine work.
axis_responsibility.Evidence: Checker/profile results and notification packets remain support evidence, not source truth or closure proof.
axis_responsibility.Link: Frontier, disposition owner, Movement, and handoff meaning remain Link/caller-owned; reporter only renders observed state.
axis_responsibility.Support: reporter/report_sinks/run/walker wiring filters sinks, renders packets, and records delivery observations.

candidate_file_changes: support/operator/reporter.py: add real-vessel external eligibility helper, mode validation, basic default including building_started, stage-line packet projection, and new negative probes.
support/operator/report_sinks.py: replace Slack text formatter, hide empty refs, load title/stage/status/action labels from label_map, and keep credential/body redaction behavior.
support/operator/run.py: thread real-vessel sink filtering and verbose stage observations through the existing best-effort event seam.
support/operator/walker_kernel.py: mirror run.py event filtering/stage behavior for dynamic walks and resumes without re-emitting started on resume.
support/operator/label_map.json: add only missing Korean status/action/stage sentence labels if existing events/actions are insufficient.

support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py and support/checkers/profiles/read_side_projection_boundary.yaml: pin real-vessel guard, message voice, verbose mode, label parity, no-scheduler, no-new-sink, and no-authority-leak probes.
checker_or_verifier_plan: Extend reporter_notification_projection checker before implementation: temp fixture completion with fake Slack/dashboard senders observes sender count 0, repo inbox untouched, fixture inbox only.
Add real-vessel temp source-copy drive: completion under source-copy project/<vessel>/buildings invokes fake sender exactly once when env and policy allow it.
Add mutated-guard RED probe: disabling the real-vessel guard causes the fixture sender-count assertion to fail.
Update message-shape specimen pin with before/after text, empty-field hiding, exactly one ref line, and proof-limit line.
Add verbose-mode temp drive over a multi-step Building and assert rendered completed-step lines use canonical label_map brick kind labels.
Keep or extend label parity pin if new label_map sections are introduced.

Final gate after implementation: run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all in a writable temp source copy and report the copy path.
returned.design_summary: Design the change as a support-only notification projection repair: external sinks are real-vessel-only by the buildings_root_for/project_ref_for_building_root seam, message text becomes compact Korean human voice, and the stage dial is a declarable report_event_policy mode with basic as default.
edge_cases: Temp source-copy real-vessel root versus temp output fixture root must be distinguished.
Parked/chat-session and human gate frontiers both map to intervention_required.
Missing or unreadable work/task.md falls back to building_id.
Missing Slack/dashboard env still filters those sinks before attempted delivery.
Explicit mismatched project_ref remains a loud reject.
Notification failure must not write into or void the Building's observed evidence tree.
invariants: External sinks fire only for real-vessel Building roots resolved through the canonical seam.
Fixture/temp completions never invoke Slack/dashboard senders even when env vars and fake senders are present.
Empty fields are hidden; specifically step=- must not appear.
Exactly one compact ref line is rendered.
Every message keeps a short projection-not-judgment line.
Verbose mode is declarable; this vessel remains basic default.
not_proven: No implementation was made in this read-only design turn.
Full checker green is not observed because the sandbox had no usable temporary directory.

Archive packet paths named by AGENTS.md were not present in this worktree at archive/status-kernel/current-brick-operating-packet-0531.md or archive/status-kernel/brick-protocol-post-d-surface-recompile-0-plan-0530.md.
Real Slack/dashboard delivery reliability is not proven.
Reader noticed notification is not proven.
Semantic correctness of future stage wording is not proven.
Future Building correctness, provider behavior, source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, and Movement authority are not proven.
observed_evidence: Repository observed at /Users/smith/projects/BRICK-wt-notify on branch claude/track-notify; no file edits were made.

AGENTS.md says support/reporters/projections are evidence only and must not become source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, Movement authority, target selector, or scheduler/queue/retry runtime.
Current report_event_policy default is event_kinds=['building_finished','intervention_required']; building_started is admitted but excluded from the default basic policy.
run.py and walker_kernel.py already call building_started at run start, so the missing default policy entry is enough to suppress the basic start bell.

Current Slack specimen before renderer: "빌딩 알림
빌딩: notify-v2-vessel-guard-voice
상태: 멈춤·개입 필요
작업 단계: 작업
담당 역할: 워커
필요 조치: 호출자 또는 COO 처분 필요
운영 refs: brick=brick-notify-v2-vessel-guard-voice-work; step=-; frontier=link_paused:event:intervention_required
한계: support projection; source truth/성공판정/품질판정/Movement 권한 아님"

Seam probe: project_ref_for_building_root(real buildings_root_for('project:brick-protocol') child) returned project:brick-protocol; a temp path under /tmp/probe-repo/project/brick-protocol/buildings returns project:brick-protocol only when repo_root is the temp repo, so external delivery must anchor to the real source-copy REPO_ROOT seam.

Full checker command attempted: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all. It exited 1 because this sandbox has no usable temporary directory, so full gate green is not observed.

proposed_changes.basic_policy: Change DEFAULT_BUILDING_EVENT_KINDS to building_started, intervention_required, building_finished. Leave the current vessel config at the basic default.
proposed_changes.human_voice: Replace _slack_message_text with a compact formatter using task title from work/task.md first non-empty line, fallback building_id, canonical label_map labels, omitted empty fields, one compact ref line, and the short proof-limit line.
proposed_changes.local_inbox_scope: For non-real fixture roots, keep local-inbox delivery rooted in the fixture/source-copy repo passed to the run, never the operator checkout status/inbox and never inside the observed Building tree.
proposed_changes.message_specimen_after_candidate:
🧱 Notification v2 — real-vessel-only bell (F12) + human voice + stage dial
→ 멈췄어요 — 살펴봐 주세요

누구: 워커
다음: 호출자 또는 COO 처분 필요
ref: notify-v2-vessel-guard-voice · frontier=link_paused:event:intervention_required
※ 상태 알림일 뿐 판단 아님
proposed_changes.real_vessel_guard: Add a reporter-side helper that classifies external delivery eligibility only when the building root is under the active source-copy buildings_root_for(project_ref) round-trip. Temp fixture roots may still render/write their own local inbox packet, but Slack/dashboard sender paths are filtered out before delivery.
proposed_changes.stage_dial: Add report_event_policy.mode with admitted values basic and verbose. basic derives the three lifecycle events. verbose keeps those events and renders one completed-step line per observed completed step using brick kind labels; do not admit step_completed as a new event kind.

relevant_current_structure.capture.py: Owns buildings_root_for and project_ref_for_building_root; this is the correct seam for real-vessel membership.
relevant_current_structure.kernel_checks.py: Current reporter checker pins message shape and auto-wire behavior, but currently expects fake Slack from temp fixture roots.
relevant_current_structure.report_sinks.py: Owns sink fan-out, Slack/dashboard gated delivery, local inbox writes, label_map loading, and the current stiff Slack formatter.
relevant_current_structure.reporter.py: Owns report_event_policy, event packet rendering, vessel auto-derivation probes, and Building event hook probes.
relevant_current_structure.run.py_and_walker_kernel.py: Already emit start and terminal Building events best-effort; notification exceptions are captured without breaking Building evidence writes.

returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No link/, agent/, brick/, or project/ edits are part of this design.
No new sink ref, scheduler, queue, retry, timer, thread, webhook, database, provider runtime, Movement literal, GateFact, route target selector, success judgment, or quality judgment.
Slack/dashboard credential bodies remain environment-only and are not recorded.
Reporter remains support projection evidence only.
